subcodes.first_line: We have indeed expounded the Book and set forth the verses, that perchance men might recognize what they behold of the Manifestation of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا فصلنا الکتاب و صرفنا الایات لعل الناس یعترفون بما یرون من ظهور الله و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
